documents.title: Nimbus Oven Pro 12 Setup and Wi-Fi Pairing
documents.text:
# Nimbus Oven Pro 12 Setup and Wi-Fi Pairing

## First-time setup
1. Plug in the oven and wait until the display shows the welcome screen.
2. Select your language and confirm the device region.
3. Open Settings, choose Network, and confirm that Wi-Fi is enabled.
4. Hold the Pair button for 5 seconds until the wireless icon starts blinking.
5. In the mobile app, choose Add Appliance and scan for the Oven Pro 12.

## If pairing fails
- Confirm that the customer is using a 2.4 GHz network because the Oven Pro 12 does not support 5 GHz onboarding.
- Ask the customer to move the router closer than 5 meters for the first pairing attempt.
- Restart the mobile app before repeating the scan.
- If the wireless icon remains solid, hold Pair and Start together for 10 seconds to reset only the network settings.

## Escalation guidance
Escalate the case if the oven still fails to pair after a network reset and a second onboarding attempt on a confirmed 2.4 GHz network.

documents.title: Nimbus Home Warranty and Returns Policy
documents.text:
# Nimbus Home Warranty and Returns Policy

## Return window
Customers can request a standard return within 14 calendar days of delivery when the product is unused and returned with all accessories.

## Warranty coverage
Nimbus Home offers a 24-month limited warranty for manufacturing defects on smart appliances purchased through approved channels.

## Evidence required
- Order number
- Product serial number
- Short problem description
- A photo or video if the issue is physical damage or an installation fault

## Non-returnable situations
Opened water filters, custom installation services, and products damaged by misuse are not eligible for a standard return.

documents.title: BrewMaster Mini Error Code Guide
documents.text:
# BrewMaster Mini Error Code Guide

## Error E12
Error E12 means low water flow during brewing. Run a full descale cycle, rinse the water tank, and confirm that the intake tube is seated correctly.

## Error E21
Error E21 means the brew chamber is blocked. Remove the capsule, power cycle the machine, and clean the chamber before retrying.

## When to replace the unit
If the same error returns after two full troubleshooting cycles and the device is still within warranty, create a warranty replacement case instead of scheduling a repair.

documents.title: Premium Support SLA and Escalation Rules
documents.text:
# Premium Support SLA and Escalation Rules

## Response commitments
Premium support cases must receive first response within 30 minutes during business hours and within 2 hours after hours.

## Escalation triggers
- Safety incidents involving smoke, sparks, or overheating
- Repeat failures after the documented troubleshooting flow has been completed twice
- Customer reports of a failed replacement device

## Contact channel
Premium support can be reached at support@nimbushome.example or +1 555 014 7722.

## Case notes
Every escalation must include the product model, serial number, troubleshooting steps already completed, and the current customer impact.

documents.title: Field Technician Visit Checklist
documents.text:
# Field Technician Visit Checklist

## Before arrival
- Confirm the customer address and availability window.
- Review the serial number and previous support notes.
- Check whether replacement parts are already approved.

## On site
1. Photograph the device label before any repair work starts.
2. Record visible damage, leaks, or signs of overheating.
3. Test the device on a known-good outlet if power issues are reported.
4. Capture the final status in the case notes before leaving.

## Escalate immediately
Escalate immediately if there is evidence of smoke, burning smell, sparks, or a failed safety cutoff.
